_comment: Machine-checkable license terms per model. 'safe': usable by a typical non-enterprise user under a permissive (Apache/MIT/community-under-cap) license -> allowed in Safe mode. Non-safe models are blocked in Safe mode and require explicit consent in Research mode. 'excluded_territories' is an absolute block for that territory. Verify against each model's actual LICENSE before commercial use; see docs/LICENSES.md.

svd.notes: Stable Video Diffusion — first proven image->video path. Free for personal/research use; non-commercial. Verified rendering on GPU.

ltx23.notes: Free for research and for companies under $10M ARR; above that needs a paid Lightricks license (2x liquidated damages clause). NOT Apache despite some blogs. Also needs gated google/gemma-3-12b-it text encoder.

hunyuanvideo15.notes: Source-available with conditions; excludes EU/UK/South Korea entirely.

zimage.notes: #1 open-weights image model on arena as of mid-2026.

sd15.notes: Stable Diffusion 1.5 — the first proven render path (verified on GPU). Open, broadly usable.

qwen_image_edit.notes: Multi-reference identity lock; license-safe consistency engine.

chatterbox.notes: Embeds an inaudible Perth watermark in output — disclosed, not a block.

stable_audio_open.notes: Free for individuals and businesses under $1M annual revenue; above that needs a Stability enterprise license.

ffmpeg_master.notes: A tool, not a model. Standard ffmpeg licensing applies to the binary.

ollama.notes: The Qwen/Llama weights pulled by Ollama carry their own licenses; default picks (Qwen2.5) are commercially usable.
